roadmapStages.title: Python Fundamentals for AI
roadmapStages.description: Learn Python programming language essentials tailored specifically for data manipulation, scripting, and basic AI computations.

roadmapStages.title: Machine Learning Essentials
roadmapStages.description: An end-to-end guide to modern machine learning. Dive deep into supervised and unsupervised learning.

roadmapStages.title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
roadmapStages.description: Unlock the power of neural networks. Master Feedforward networks, CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers.
